deviations.what: The original controller loads the shared demo supplier.json and element-binds a single record (/SupplierCollection/0); flattened here to top-level default-model fields the {…} SimpleForm bindings resolve against. Values are supplier.json SupplierCollection row 0 (Red Point Stores, Maintown); unbound columns (Tel, Sms, Rating, …) are dropped.
